valid.name: join-on
valid.code: SELECT 1 FROM a JOIN b ON a.id = b.id;

valid.name: join-using
valid.code: SELECT 1 FROM a JOIN b USING (id);

invalid.name: natural-join
invalid.code: SELECT 1 FROM a NATURAL JOIN b;

errors.message: Avoid `NATURAL JOIN`. The join columns are implicit — any future column with a matching name on both sides silently changes the result. Use `JOIN ... USING (...)` or `JOIN ... ON ...` and name the columns.

invalid.name: natural-left-join
invalid.code: SELECT 1 FROM a NATURAL LEFT JOIN b;

errors.message: Avoid `NATURAL JOIN`. The join columns are implicit — any future column with a matching name on both sides silently changes the result. Use `JOIN ... USING (...)` or `JOIN ... ON ...` and name the columns.
